notes: IC-9700 uses Silicon Labs CP210x (ttyUSB, not ttyACM)
Two serial ports created: serial 'A' = CI-V (CAT), serial 'B' = data
Menu > Set > Connectors > CI-V > CI-V Baud Rate: 19200
Menu > Set > Connectors > CI-V > CI-V Address: A2 (default)
Menu > Set > Connectors > CI-V > CI-V Transceive: OFF
Menu > Set > Connectors > CI-V > CI-V DATA Baud Rate: 9600
Menu > Set > Connectors > CI-V > CI-V DATE Echo Back: ON
Menu > Set > Connectors > DATA MOD: ACC
Menu > Set > Connectors > USB (B) Function: OFF
Menu > Set > Connectors > DATA Function: CI-V
Menu > Set > Connectors > ACC Send Output: 144 ON, 430 ON
Digirig connects to CI-V jack (3.5mm) for CAT/PTT in Remote and DATA jack for audio in ACC
PTT is controlled via RTS on the Digirig serial port
PTT Via COM port using RTS (not CAT commands)
Wine COM5 must be symlinked to /dev/ttyUSB0 (Digirig)
If using USB cable directly, PTT can use CAT instead of RTS
